title: ChatGPT plugin to explore monday.com App Marketplace data

posts.author: Halyna (Halyna Kudlak)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey, monday.com Community!

Wanted to share the GPT developed by my team that some of you might find handy – Monday Marketplace Insights. This plugin is built to help you quickly access and make sense of data on monday.com App Marketplace.

With it, you can:

  • Check app performance : Track installations, ratings, and reviews over time to see how an app is trending.
  • Compare similar apps : Easily line up apps by features, popularity, and category.
  • Analyze vendors : Get data on a developer’s top apps, sorted by performance metrics.

Why It’s Useful

Sometimes, finding the right app can be tricky. This tool lets you ask for data about specific apps or categories and get straightforward answers, often with visualizations for easy reading.

If you’ve ever wondered which CRM app has the best rating trend or which project management tool other teams are adopting, this tool lets you dig into those questions with ease.

Let me know if you want to know more, or try it out if you’re curious about exploring marketplace data a bit deeper!
